hub.title: Studio Tools
hub.subtitle: Standalone tools — sit alongside the main pipeline, for personal creative workflows.
hub.footer: These tools do not depend on the main pipeline (novel-promotion / task queue). API keys are passed in requests and never persisted.

mimoTts.title: MiMo TTS
mimoTts.desc: Speech synthesis via Xiaomi MiMo TTS models. Paste text, get a WAV file.

jimeng.title: Jimeng Manual Bridge
jimeng.desc: Compose Jimeng video prompts, jump to the website to generate, and re-upload the result video to local storage.

fourView.title: Character Four Views
fourView.desc: Manage 4 reference images per character (front / three-quarter / side / back). Consistency anchor.

mimoTts.title: MiMo TTS
mimoTts.subtitle: OpenAI-compatible Xiaomi MiMo TTS gateway. Response is base64 WAV, playable or downloadable.

jimeng.title: Jimeng Manual Bridge
jimeng.subtitle: Jimeng has no public API. This tool runs a human-in-the-loop flow:
jimeng.subtitleSteps: ① Compose prompt → ② Open Jimeng to generate → ③ Download mp4 → ④ Upload back to local storage

fields.subject: Subject *
fields.subjectHint: e.g. an elder in a deep blue robe
fields.actionHint: e.g. slowly raises right hand to touch the porcelain vase
fields.cameraHint: e.g. close-up, slow medium push, follow shot
fields.lightingHint: e.g. warm side light, soft morning light

result.promptHint: Jimeng prompt (paste into the website input)

errors.copyFailed: The browser blocked automatic copy. Select the text and copy it manually.

upload.heading: ② Upload mp4
upload.subtitle: After downloading the video from Jimeng, upload it here to local storage (MinIO / local).

fields.panelIdHint: Optional; if set, the video will be written into the panel's videoUrl/videoMediaId (login + project ownership required)

fourView.title: Character Four-View Manager
fourView.subtitle: Inspired by AIComicBuilder — manage 4 reference images per character (front / three-quarter / side / back) as a consistency anchor for storyboard panel generation.
fourView.fieldsHint: Maps to: referenceFrontUrl / referenceThreeQuarterUrl / referenceSideUrl / referenceBackUrl

controls.loadHint: Hint: find characterId in the workspace character page, or via Prisma Studio.

panelModal.triggerHint: Generate this panel's video on Jimeng website, then upload back
panelModal.title: Generate this panel via Jimeng
panelModal.copyFailed: The browser blocked automatic copy. Select the text and copy it manually.
panelModal.noReferences: No reference images available. The prompt can still be copied.
panelModal.uploadHint: After Jimeng generation completes, download the mp4 and upload here. It will be written to this panel's videoUrl.
panelModal.linkedLabel: ✓ Linked to panel. Refresh to see.
